iterations.theme: Overcoming Obstacles to Spiritual Healing and Growth
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript presents a unified message about identifying and overcoming spiritual obstacles, fitting within the allowed time frame for a single iteration without interrupting the logical flow of the 'five obstacles' structure.

chapters.topic: Introduction, New Year Wishes, and Call to Spiritual Battle

The Trap of Not Forgiving Oneself After God's Forgiveness

Real-Life Examples of Occult Influence and Deliverance
